apigateway.clientcertificate.CfnAbout: The `AWS::ApiGateway::ClientCertificate` resource creates a client certificate that API Gateway uses to configure client-side SSL authentication for sending requests to the integration endpoint.

apigateway.clientcertificate.Description.Description: The description of the client certificate.

apigateway.clientcertificate.Tags.Description: The collection of tags. Each tag element is associated with a given resource.
